methodology.source: synthetic local npm tarballs via package-lock diff plus runScan first-install probes
methodology.networkAccess: disabled; artifacts generated inside studies/.scratch-npm-fp-exotic and resolved via file:// fetchOverride
focus: subprocess wrappers with child_process already present
vm/sandbox packages using vm in both versions
crypto/security packages with legitimate secret reads
native addons with stable path but changed .node bytes

deltaMiss.description: Capability existed in both versions but a detector still fired on bump

nativeRecompile.description: Routine native-addon bump with same artifact path but different .node bytes triggered bin.new-native-artifact

sensitiveEnvGap.description: Expected-sensitive env key did not trigger env.token-harvest on first install

coverageGaps.proposedFix: Teach bin.new-native-artifact to treat stable native artifact paths across routine version bumps as lower-confidence, or hash-diff only when paired with new install hooks/FS writes/obfuscation.
Expand SENSITIVE_ENV_KEYS with the missing secret names so first-install reads of common app, mail, database, Python publish, and bot tokens trigger env.token-harvest.
